name: solana_token_safety_check
description: Quick safety screening for any Solana SPL token. Returns: risk score (0-100), risk level (LOW/MODERATE/HIGH/CRITICAL/EXTREME), human-readable summary, token name/symbol, whether authorities are renounced, trusted_authority (true when active authority belongs to a known issuer like Circle USDC or Tether), liquidity rating (DEEP/MODERATE/SHALLOW/NONE), top-10 holder concentration percentage (PDA-adjusted — only known DeFi protocol accounts excluded via whitelist), honeypot status (can_sell), token age, Token-2022 extension risks, data_confidence ('complete' or 'partial'), and degraded_note (human-readable explanation when partial). This is a FREE lite check — for full details (individual authority addresses, top holder breakdown with addresses, wallet/PDA classification, owner program identification, LP lock status and locker identity, honeypot sell tax, field-level change detection), use the x402 paid endpoint at GET /v1/check?mint=<address> ($0.008 USDC per request). Also available: GET /v1/decide?mint=<address>&threshold=N — free binary SAFE/RISKY/UNKNOWN decision with score_reliable flag (false when data is partial). If data_confidence='partial', some checks failed — the risk_score includes uncertainty penalties but may not reflect true risk.

mint_address.description: Solana token mint address in base58 format
